prompt: Can you show me the paragraph that comes right after this one in a document?

bedrock.response_text:
I’d be glad to help, but I’ll need a bit more context to locate the paragraph you’re referring to. The prompt you provided doesn’t include the original paragraph, the document title, or any surrounding text, so I can’t identify which section you’re referencing or what follows it.

Based on the reference materials provided, there is no specific document or text excerpt included that I can cross-reference [1][7]. To retrieve the exact next paragraph, please share one of the following:
- The full text of the paragraph you’re currently on
- The document title, file name, or a brief description of its source
- A few sentences of surrounding context (the paragraph before and after)

Once you provide that, I’ll quickly extract the following paragraph and format it exactly as it appears in the source. If you’d also like analysis, editing, or citation formatting applied, just let me know.
